overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian industrial district at sunset. The journey progresses from open sidewalks alongside warehouses, across a neon-lit intersection, and into a dimly lit underpass beneath an elevated highway.

events.description: a black car passes by on the street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to industrial warehouses with smokestacks visible in the distance

entered.detail: large blue industrial building with corrugated metal walls and graffiti
tall modern street lamp with horizontal light fixture
tall factory smokestacks emitting smoke against the sunset sky
elevated highway structure with support columns

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a steady walk along a concrete sidewalk beside industrial warehouses. The setting sun casts long shadows and bathes the scene in warm orange light. Sparse traffic moves along the multi-lane road to the right, while distant smokestacks punctuate the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with neon commercial signage

events.description: turns right and steps off the sidewalk onto the crosswalk
waits for traffic then crosses the street toward the opposite sidewalk
continues walking straight toward the dark underpass entrance ahead

agents.ego_description: crosses the intersection and walks along the street toward a covered underpass, passing pedestrians waiting at the corner

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing at the corner waiting to cross
black sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: commercial buildings with bright yellow and green neon signage and advertisements
concrete parking structure with visible air conditioning units and metal grates
dark tunnel entrance beneath the elevated highway structure

segments.scene_description: The character turns right and crosses the open intersection, moving from the industrial warehouse zone toward a more commercial area with bright neon signage. After crossing, the walk continues along the street toward a dark underpass entrance beneath the elevated highway, passing other pedestrians and moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: enters the covered underpass beneath the elevated highway structure
ambient light drops significantly as the camera moves into the shadow of the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit underpass, passing cardboard boxes and debris, following a pedestrian ahead toward the distant exit light

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt walking ahead through the underpass

entered.detail: massive concrete ceiling and support pillars of the highway overpass creating a tunnel effect
stacked cardboard boxes and bags of trash along the left wall
metal barrier separating the pedestrian walkway from the street traffic

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into the sheltered underpass beneath the elevated highway, where natural light fades to dim shadow. The walkway is lined with concrete support pillars, discarded cardboard boxes, and a metal railing separating the path from the street. The character follows another pedestrian through the tunnel toward the bright exit visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sun-drenched industrial district into the dim shadows of a concrete underpass. It begins with a steady walk along a concrete sidewalk beside warehouses, where the setting sun casts long shadows and bathes the horizon of distant smokestacks in warm orange light. As the camera turns right to cross an open intersection, the industrial scenery shifts toward a commercial zone characterized by bright neon signage and increased pedestrian traffic. The scene then transitions from the open street into the sheltered entrance of an underpass beneath an elevated highway, causing the natural light to fade into deep shadow. Finally, the camera moves past concrete support pillars and discarded cardboard boxes, following another pedestrian toward a bright exit visible in the distance.
